div.style: font-family: 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, sans-serif; padding: 0 10px;

h3.style: margin: 0 0 6px 0; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #e11d48; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

div.p: Click on any of the 16 labels above to highlight the corresponding helicopter part and learn more about its incredible function here.
